ranked_materials.name: Electricity / Grid Power
ranked_materials.rationale: 4 companies in the demo buffer flag grid power as a binding constraint on planned capex, led by data-center and EV expansion.
dissenting_evidence: NEE notes regional transmission timelines remain uncertain

ranked_materials.name: Lithium
ranked_materials.rationale: TSLA and GM both flag large battery-grade lithium purchases ramping into Q2–Q3 2026; AAPL signals steady consumer-electronics cell demand.

ranked_materials.name: Copper
ranked_materials.rationale: FCX and downstream electrification names describe sustained conductor demand, though one producer expects moderation after mid-2026.
dissenting_evidence: FCX cites softer spot treatment charges in H2

ranked_materials.name: Semiconductors
ranked_materials.rationale: NVDA and AMD describe AI accelerator buildouts extending lead times on advanced packaging inputs.

ranked_materials.name: Natural Gas
ranked_materials.rationale: NEE references gas-peaking capacity as bridge fuel for regional grid upgrades.
